title: Navigating life in a new land
description: Duke Kunshan freshman Quinn Bradley came to China for something different, and found unfamiliar food, new friends and a kind and welcoming local community.
text:
Navigating life in a new land
Duke Kunshan freshman Quinn Bradley came to China for something different, and found unfamiliar food, new friends and a kind and welcoming local community.
